scenarios.description: parse(html non-empty, baseUri non-empty) returns Document with correct baseUri and body content
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned such that document.baseUri() equals the given baseUri and document.body().html() contains the input html fragment

scenarios.description: parse(html empty, baseUri empty) returns empty Document body
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned such that document.body().html() is empty string and document.baseUri() is empty string

scenarios.description: parse(html non-empty, baseUri non-empty, custom Parser) invokes parser.parseInput
scenarios.precondition: Parser stub provided because real Parser.parseInput must be isolated; stub returns Document with stub marker
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned is the stub Document returned by parser.parseInput
pseudocode:
String html = "
Test
"; String baseUri = "http://x/"; Parser parser = stub that returns docStub;

scenarios.description: parse(html non-empty, custom Parser) with empty baseUri string overload
scenarios.precondition: Parser stub provided to isolate parseInput
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned is stub Document from parser.parseInput(html,"")
pseudocode: String html = "Foo"; Parser parser = stub that returns docA;

scenarios.description: parse(html empty) returns Document with empty body and empty baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned such that document.body().html() is empty and document.baseUri() is empty string

scenarios.description: parse(html with UTF-8 BOM) returns Document preserving content
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned such that body.html() contains the UTF-8 content excluding BOM

scenarios.description: parse(File,fileName charsetName=null, baseUri) throws IOException when file not found
scenarios.precondition: File stub pointing to non-existent path; DataUtil.load will throw IOException
pseudocode: File file = new File("doesNotExist.html"); String charset = null; String baseUri = "http://a/";

scenarios.description: parse(File,charsetName not null, baseUri) returns Document for small file
scenarios.precondition: temporary File created with UTF-8 content
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned such that body.html() contains file content and baseUri equals given baseUri
pseudocode: File file = tempFile with content "OK"; String charset = "UTF-8"; String baseUri = "http://x/";

scenarios.description: parse(URL valid http, timeoutMillis positive) returns Document via HTTP GET
scenarios.precondition: Embedded test HTTP server returns simple HTML on GET; HttpConnection.connect uses real implementation
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned whose body.html() contains the server response and baseUri equals URL.toExternalForm()
